name: Legal Research & Analysis
description: Legal research toolkit for statute and case law retrieval, precedent analysis, and jurisdiction-aware summarization. Supports fetching legal documents from web sources, extracting holdings and rationale, cross-referencing citations, and producing structured legal memoranda. All outputs carry jurisdiction and temporal scope metadata to guard against stale or inapplicable conclusions.
uncertaintyModel: Legal conclusions are jurisdiction-specific and time-sensitive. Precedent strength measured by court level, recency, and number of citations. Statutory analysis tagged with effective-date ranges and amendment history. Conflicting authority across circuits or jurisdictions is flagged explicitly rather than resolved silently.

metadata.disclaimer: This plugin assists with legal research but does not provide legal advice. All outputs should be reviewed by a qualified attorney.
